content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于8月18日08:00~12:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月1日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。

【更新内容】
一、活动
【角色活动：凯蒂古拉】
● 在 8 月 18 日 9:00 - 9 月 8 日 9:00 期间，以下活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「永燃之火」：混沌界域伤害型唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「死亡如约」：命轮「琥珀色的死亡」。
    ○ 试玩活动「爆燃之主」：试用「凯蒂古拉」。可以领取「银芯」×40、「流明之芯」×1。
● 玩法活动「坠临的万千耀光」将于 8 月 18 日 9:00 - 9 月 1 日 9:00  开放！
    ○ 攻略活动将有机会获得活动限定 SR 命轮「迫近的太阳」与活动限定头像「以银钥之名：凯蒂古拉」。
    ○ 活动期间「意识潜游：不朽极昼」免费解锁开启！
    ○ 活动期间「爆燃之主的礼物」系列精选礼盒限时上架！
 
【意识潜游：不朽极昼】
● 「意识潜游」新增凯蒂古拉篇章「不朽极昼」！
    ○ 剧情简介：漆黑的太阳高悬于天，邀请你进入这场游戏。这场游戏没有胜利和喜悦，迎接你的只剩无边的绝望和痛苦。你没有权力拒绝，因为结局早已注定。身边的每一粒沙，每一滴水，每一缕风，都将化作祂的狞笑，肆意享用你无用的挣扎。直到……那不朽的极昼于死亡中落下，将一切焚烧成灰。
● 通关后，即可解锁全新钥令「不落的太阳」。
    ○ 钥令效果：获得 30% 临时强效 和 1 点算力。如果凯蒂古拉在队伍中，抽 1 张其指令卡并为其赋予 1 层「活焰」。
 
【必得唤醒：往事失落以前】
● 新增必得唤醒「往事失落以前」，守密人完成序章通关后 60 天内限时开放。
    ○ 分为 4 个界域唤醒，每个界域唤醒仅可进行 1 次 5 连唤醒，每次5连唤醒需要 980 源液，并可额外获得 「原初灵核」×1。
    ○ 唤醒 5 次必得 随机SSR唤醒体 ×2 和 随机SSR命轮 ×3
        ■ 混沌：莉莉、24、莱克、哈姆林、塔薇；跨越疼痛、畸体回噬、好运时间、永恒安魂曲、隐世的转轮。
        ■ 深海：图鲁、墨菲、弥利亚姆；神王的颂歌、隐秘的诞生、虔诚的伟力。
        ■ 血肉：索蕾尔、萨尔瓦多、泰旖丝、血链·希洛；以蔷薇之名、神言石板、慈悲的哺育、沉入殷红。
        ■ 超维：达芙黛尔、旺达、奥尔拉；至为珍贵的藏品、女王的戒律、诗笺的句尾。
    ○ 对于更新前已经完成序章通关的守密人，则在本次更新后首次登录 60 天内限时开放。
 
【活动唤醒复刻】
● 在 8 月 25 日 9:00 - 9 月 22 日 9:00 期间，以下唤醒活动复刻限时开放！
● 「三相衡生」角色活动唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下角色活动唤醒之一。
    ○ 角色活动唤醒复刻「落纸成灰」：超维界域辅助型唤醒体「奥尔拉」。
    ○ 角色活动唤醒复刻「万律奏鸣」：混沌界域辅助型唤醒体「哈姆林」。
    ○ 角色活动唤醒复刻「天火领航」：深海界域辅助型唤醒体「克珀珊特」。
    ○ 以上唤醒体试玩活动同步开放。
● 「因果苗圃」命轮活动唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下命轮活动唤醒之一。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「花园余墨」：命轮「诗笺的句尾」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「亵渎乐章」：命轮「永恒安魂曲」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「溟海道标」：命轮「圣火中的指引」。

【活动复刻：奥尔拉】
● 在 8 月 25 日 9:00 - 9 月 8 日 9:00  期间，玩法活动复刻「在春天凋零以前」限时开放！
    ○ 攻略活动将有机会获得活动限定 SR 命轮「往昔的花与诗」与活动限定头像「以银钥之名：奥尔拉」。
    ○ 活动期间「特遣纪录：玫瑰的栖居」免费解锁开启！
    ○ 活动期间「花与诗的梦」系列精选礼盒限时上架！
 
【学园活动：第二十一期】
● 在 8 月 18 日 9:00 - 9 月 8 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！本次学园活动为持续 21 天的特殊学园活动。 
● 第二十一期「学园礼赠」
    ○ 活动期间累计登录 7 天即可领取「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录 21 天可获得其他奖励！
● 第二十一期「课题纪录」
    ○ 本期核心课题·限定头像：「永不褪色的昨天：萝坦」、「永不褪色的昨天：艾尔瓦」。
    ○ 本期核心课题·限定对战表情：「快乐弥萨格：潘狄娅·爱」、「课余时间篇：墨菲·哼哼」、「比心弥萨格：雷娅·比心」、「课余时间篇：艾尔瓦·欲言又止」。
    ○ 本期特别课题纪录期间完成每日任务、每周任务和学期任务可以获得双倍的课题经验。
● 第二十一赛季「不朽极昼」
    ○ 本赛季·限定对战表情：「发疯弥萨格：「24」·想死」、「比心弥萨格：尤乌哈希·比心」、「校园生活篇：詹金·鬼鬼祟祟」、「课余时间篇：希洛·摸鱼」。
 
【邀请活动】
● 新增邀请活动，守密人完成序章后即可解锁邀请活动。
● 邀请新的守密人输入邀请码共计可以获得幻衣「朵尔-灵性重塑」、「银芯」*1200
    ○ 通关序章后，7 天内可输入其他守密人的邀请码，输入后可立即获得 「银芯」×300。
    ○ 每位守密人只可接受 1 位守密人的邀请。
    ○ 每位守密人至多可以邀请 50 位新守密人，若受邀的守密人调查等级未达到 5 级，则不计入邀请人数。
    ○ 每位受邀的守密人在达到 5/10/15/20 级后，守密人可分别获得 20/20/20/40「银钥辉光」。
    ○ 「银钥辉光」达到 400 后，即可领取幻衣「朵尔-灵性重塑」。
● 对更新前已经通关序章的守密人，更新后首次登录 7 天内可输入其他守密人的邀请码。

二、系统
【课题纪录】
● 「课题礼匣」新增了选项：「流明之芯」×5，守密人现在可以有更多选择。
 
【相位对弈】
● 优化了赛季积分低于1500时的匹配和积分获得体验。
    ○ 守密人初次体验「相位对弈」时，匹配到系统预设对手的场次提升。
    ○ 新手保护的积分由 1000 提高到 1500。
    ○ 低于 1500 积分的守密人在对战失败后，下一场将更容易匹配到系统预设对手。
    ○ 低于 1500 积分的守密人，每日第一场对战都将匹配到系统预设对手。
 
【幕间演习】
● 单次重现最大可消耗的灵啡肽从 300 提高为 1000。
 
【纪行】
● 有可领取奖励时，打开相应纪行后将默认定位到可领取奖励的位置。
 
【社区】
● 新增了「reddit」链接，首次访问获得 「银芯」×100 。  
● 新增了「X」链接，首次访问获得「银芯」×100。
 
【物资】
对于「原质乐园」「轮转之书」等此类道具，现在可以在物品信息中查看可能获得物品的详情预览。

三、战斗
【唤醒体】
● 潘狄娅
    ○ 新增天赋-「惩罚时间」：潘狄娅自身装备、命轮、密契每拥有 1％暴击率，造成的永久反击提高 0.2％。
    ○ 灵塑适性：「狂气使役之鞭」获得保留和预备。潘狄娅对意图造成伤害的目标造成的最终伤害提高 5~15%。目标每额外攻击 1 次提高 5%，至多额外提高 20%。 
    ○ 「狂气爆发-蜜糖色悲惨幻象」：现在对抗任意数量的敌人，均会造成 2 次伤害。
    ○ 「超限爆发=甘之如饴」新增效果：造成伤害前对全体敌方施加 1 层「易伤」。
    ○ 「灼燃滴蜡之欲」：偷取力量的效果由 8％ 攻击力提高至 16％，对抗单个敌人时不再额外偷取力量。
● 宁菲亚
    ○ 自我的葬仪：触发中毒由 100% 提高为 120%。获得的力量提高 50%。
    ○ 灵知觉醒-沉逝苦海：新增回合结束时，使宁菲亚造成的中毒提高 5~10%。
    ○ 启灵 1-海之躯体：造成的中毒提高由 50% 提高为 100%。获得的护盾提高 50%。
    ○ 启灵3-雪浪浮花：后续「自我的葬仪」施加的中毒由 72 提高到 108 点。
    ○ 灵塑适性：宁菲亚的触发中毒效果提高 15%~35%，所有唤醒体造成的中毒提高 10%。
● 哈姆林
    ○ 启灵 3-月下狂想：最多提高次数由 2 提高为 3。
    ○ 灵塑适性：打出「灵感」后获得攻击力 5%~10% 的临时力量，并触发 1 次「蓄势乐音」，每回合最多生效 5 次。
● 奥尔拉
    ○ 灵塑适性：首领战开始时，获得等同于奥尔拉死亡抵抗属性 5%~15% 的死亡抵抗。每次触发死亡抵抗后，直到回合结束时「纷华篇章」的对应效果提高 50~150%。 
 
【敌人】
● 修复了「凸月侍女」、「空想利刃」觉醒后，生命上限没有提高的问题。
● 降低了「王邸管家」弗兰 的最大生命。
● 降低了「灯罩」阿依莎每回合获得的加固层数，由 10 降低为 5。
● 降低了「雪之祭品」、「雪山之蛹」技能「急冻复苏」时提高的最大生命和加固层数，由 25% 和 15 降低为 15% 和 10。
● 略微提高了「知者」的最大生命。
 
【融灾禁区】
● 适当降低了融灾禁区 II、 III 、IV 级警报的敌人生命和伤害。

四、相位对弈
【新增内容】
● 机制
    ○ 算力超载：打出后若剩余算力大于算力超载所需算力，额外消耗算力触发后续效果。
    ○ 破绽：受到的主动伤害提高 25%，受到伤害或回合开始时移除。
● 唤醒体
    ○ 凯蒂古拉
        ■ 焚却世界的爆炎（狂气爆发）：对全体敌方造成 12 伤害并施加破绽。
        ■ 万物终结（算力消耗 3）：对全体敌方造成 8 伤害，对有破绽的敌人改为造成 12 伤害，预备。 算力超载 3：造成双倍伤害。
        ■ 告死魔弹（算力消耗 1）：对后排敌方造成 6 伤害并施加破绽，预备。本回合每打出过 1 张自身的「技能」，伤害提高 2。算力超载 1：打出后回到手中。 
        ■ 爆燃之火（算力消耗 2）：获得 20 狂气，临时强效 +1。
● 命轮
    ○ 琥珀色的死亡（算力消耗 2）：「狂气爆发」后对前排敌方和后排敌方造成 8 伤害并施加「破绽」。
    ○ 迫近的太阳（算力消耗 3）：「打击」伤害提高 50%，优先攻击后排敌方。
● 钥令
    ○ 不落的太阳：本回合算力可保留到下回合，延迟：获得 2 点无视上限的算力。 
 
【调整内容】
● 机制-缠绕：层数上限由 3 提高为 5。打出卡牌后受到 5 点伤害并移除一层，回合结束时移除 1 层。
● 唤醒体：
    ○ 奥吉尔
        ■ 「战斗启示」：算力消耗由 3 提高到 4 。
    ○ 旺达
        ■ 「迷途梦引」：初始临时反击由 8 降低为 7 。
    ○ 阿格里帕
        ■ 「蛛丝缠绕」：缠绕层数由 1 提高为 2，伤害由 7 提高为 8。
        ■ 「苍白的庇佑」：施加缠绕由 1 提高为 2。
    ○ 莱克
        ■ 「十环出牌」：伤害由 5 降低为 4。
    ○ 诺缔拉
        ■ 「命运工匠」：算力消耗由 1 提高为 2。
        ■ 「锈蚀扳手」：伤害由 8 降低为 7。
    ○ 弥利亚姆
        ■ 「湮灭预言」：伤害由 15 降低为 13 。
    ○ 图鲁
        ■ 「王权之威」：伤害由 8 降低为 7 。
        ■ 「万古震慑」：伤害由 20 降低为 18。
    ○ 熔毁·朵尔
        ■ 「天才的远见」：打出后算力上限降低 1 点，选择效果变为获得 3 算力或抽 2 张牌。
● 命轮：  
    ○ 活性：算力消耗由 4 降低为 3 。
    ○ 惩戒：算力消耗由 3 提高到 4，造成麻痹由 3 提高到 5 。
    ○ 百万蒙宠之眼：算力消耗由 3 降低为 2，获得的「技能」不再算力消耗 -1 。
    ○ 魔女宽檐帽：触发时机由回合结束时改为回合开始时，行动封锁层数由 5 提高为 7 。
    ○ 海上领航者：回复生命由 9 降低为 8 。
    ○ 好运时间：
        ■ 旧：「狂气爆发」抽 1 张牌，将其 2 张复制置入手中。
        ■ 新：「狂气爆发」抽 1 张「技能」，将其 2 张复制置入手中。算力消耗由 3 降低到 2 。
    ○ 永恒安魂曲：造成的出血伤害由 5 降低为 3 。
    ○ 隐秘的诞生：
        ■ 旧：回合结束时自身获得 10 狂气，每有 1 剩余算力就使其提高 10 。
        ■ 新：回合结束时自身获得 10 狂气，消耗所有剩余算力，每消耗 1 算力就使其提高 10 。
    ○ 纯银的初心：算力消耗由 2 降低到 1，获得的「技能」不再提高伤害、治疗、护盾。
● 钥令：
    ○ 湖畔回眸：不再造成伤害，施加缠绕由 1 提高为 2。
    ○ 海之祭：使目标失去的狂气由 15 提高为 25 。

五、问题修复与优化
● 修复了唤醒体怪物「冷光」使用「惩戒雷霆」时施加的易伤立刻减少 1 层的问题。
● 修复了命轮「伤痛之鳍」功能描述错误的问题。
● 修复了命轮「陨日」提供的暴击率和暴击伤害加成效果错误的被部分天赋计入唤醒体初始属性的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「黑池回溯」后在相位对弈收藏中会错误亮起并仍可编队的问题。
● 修复了自动分解命轮不能增加成就进度的问题。
● 修复了部分造物点击文字描述无法响应的问题。
● 修复了「月相观测」在跨天时偶尔有概率无法弹出的问题。
● 修复了「宿舍」播放唤醒体对话时，部分语言可能没有完整显示最后一行文本的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体在「黑池回溯」后依然出现升级特效的问题。
● 修复了「忘却篇」中某些地图事件错误扣除狂气值的问题。
● 修复了「以银钥之名：守密人」重复获得时未触发自动分解的问题。
● 优化了「银辉启程·初回特典」的礼包描述，以及「原质乐园」「轮转之书」等特殊物品的描述，「任选」调整为「选择」，避免误解。
● 优化了剧情文本的播放效果，一句剧情文本在超出两行后，将不再翻页展示，而是在同一页内继续播放。

**V2.3.1.0 Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 12:00 on August 18 (UTC+8).
You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver*200, Pure Core*5
  
[Claim Conditions]
The collection period ends on September 1, 2025 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.
  
[Update Content]
1. Activity
[Character event: Kathigu-Ra]
● The following event will be available for a limited time from 9:00 on August 18 to 9:00 on September 8!
    ○ Character Event Awakening "Eternal Conflagration": Chaos Realm Assault Awakener "Kathigu-Ra".
    ○ WoD Event Awakening "From Fomalhaut": Wheel of Destiny "Amber-Tinted Death".
    ○ Trial Play Event "The Living Flame": Try out "Kathigu-Ra". Claim "Silver" ×40 and "Luminous Core" ×1.
● The gameplay event "A Million Suns Descend" will be open from 9:00 AM on August 18 to 9:00 AM on September 1!
    ○ The strategy event will offer the chance to obtain the event-exclusive SR Wheel of Destiny "Impending Sun" and the event-exclusive avatar "By the Silver Key: Kathigu-Ra".
    ○ During the event, "Psyche Deepdive: Everburning Vex" is unlocked and available for free!
    ○ During the event, the "Gift of The Living Flame" series of Selected Gift Boxes will be available for a limited time!

[Psyche Deepdive: Everburning Vex]
● New Kathigu-Ra Chapter "Everburning Vex" added to "Psyche Deepdive"!
    ○ Story Summary: The pitch-black sun hangs high in the sky, extending The Invitation for you to enter this game. There is no victory or joy in this game—only endless despair and pain await you. You have no right to refuse, for the outcome has already been decided. Every grain of sand, every drop of water, every breeze around you will transform into His sinister laughter, freely indulging in your futile resistance. Until… the eternal polar day finally sets in death, burning everything to ashes.
● Unlocked after clearing, acquire the new Posse "Undying Sun".
    ○ Posse Effect: Gain 30% Temporary Amplification and 1 point of Arithmetica. If Kathigu-Ra is in the team, draw 1 of her Command Cards and apply 1 layer of "Fiamma" to it.

[Guaranteed Awakening: Before Memories Fade]
● Added Guaranteed Awakening "Before Memories Fade", available for 60 days after the Keeper completes the prologue.
    ○ Divided into 4 Realm Awakenings. Each Realm Awakening allows only 1 five-awakening streak. Each five-awakening streak requires 980 Silver Prime and grants 1 "Gnosis Primer" additionally.
    ○ Guaranteed to obtain Random SSR Awakener ×2 and Random SSR Wheel of Destiny ×3 every 5 Awakenings
        ■ Chaos: Lily, 24, Ryker, Hameln, Tawil; Grace Through Pain, Aberrant Devour, Hour of Fortune, Eternal Requiem, Wheel Unseen.
        ■ Aequor: Tulu, Murphy, Miryam; Hymn of the Sovereign, Shrouded Birth, Power of the Pious.
        ■ Caro: Sorel, Salvador, Thais, Helot: Catena; By Rose Alone, Tablet of Scriptures, Merciful Nurturing, Drowning in Crimson.
        ■ Ultra: Daffodil, Wanda, Horla; Treasured Rarity, Queen's Edict, The Last Verse.
    ○ For Keepers who have completed the prologue before the update, it will be temporarily available within 60 days after the first login following this update.

[Rerun]
● From 9:00 on August 25 to 9:00 on September 22, the following Awakening Event will be available for a limited-time re-release!
● "Triune Verdant" Character Event Awakening allows switching between the following Character Event Awakenings at will during the event period.
    ○ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Paper to Ash": Ultra Realm Chorus Awakener "Horla".
    ○ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Symphony of Echoes": Chaos Realm Chorus Awakener "Hameln".
    ○ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Ember Vanguard": Deep Sea Realm Chorus Awakener "Corposant Sanga".
    ○ The above Awakener trial event is also available.
● "Sylvan Omen" Wheel of Destiny Event Awakening, during the event you can freely switch between the following WoD Event Awakenings.
    ○ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Last Petal Falls": Wheel of Destiny "The Last Verse".
    ○ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Profane Anthem": Wheel of Destiny "Eternal Requiem".
    ○ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Beacon of the Deep": Wheel of Destiny "Flamebound Navigator".
 
[Event Reprint: Horla]
● During the period from 9:00 on August 25 to 9:00 on September 8, the gameplay event rerun "Before Spring Fades" will be available for a limited time!
    ○ The strategy event will offer the chance to obtain the event-exclusive SR Wheel of Destiny "Poetic Bygone Days" and the event-exclusive avatar "By the Silver Key: Horla".
    ○ During the event period, the "Special Ops: Rose's Abode" is unlocked and available for free!
    ○ During the event period, the "Dream of Flowers and Poetry" series Selected Gift Box is available for a limited time!

[Mythag Events: Season 21]
● The following Mythag Event will be available for a limited time from 9:00 AM on August 18 to 9:00 AM on September 8! This Mythag Event is a special 21-day-long Mythag Event.
● Issue 21 "Gifts from Mythag"
    ○ Log in cumulatively for 7 days during the event to claim a generous reward of ×10 "Luminous Cores"! Additional rewards can be obtained for logging in cumulatively for 21 days!
● Curriculum Issue 21
    ○ Premium Topics · Limited Avatar: "Unfading Yesterday: Lotan", "Unfading Yesterday: Alva".
    ○ This Period's Premium Topics · Limited Traphase Emotes: "Happy Mythag: Pandia - Love", "After School: Murphy · Hmph", "Heart Sign Mythag: Leigh · Heart Sign", "After School: Alva · Hesitant to Speak".
    ○ During this special course record period, completing daily tasks, weekly tasks, and semester tasks will grant double course experience.
● Season 21 "Everburning Vex"
    ○ This Season · Limited Traphase Emote: "Crazy Mythag: "24"·Want to Die", "Heart Mythag: Uvhash·Heart", "School Life: Jenkin·Sneaky", "After School: Helot·Slacking Off".

[Invitation Event]
● Added a new invitation event. Keepers can unlock the invitation event after completing the prologue.
● Inviting new Keepers and entering the invitation code can earn the Phantom Garment "Doll - Gnostic Reshape" and *1200 Silvers in total
    ○ After completing the prologue, you have 7 days to enter another Keeper's invitation code. Entering it will immediately grant you "Silver" *300.
    ○ Each Keeper can only accept the invitation from 1 other Keeper.
    ○ Each Keeper can invite up to 50 new Keepers. If an invited Keeper's Investigation level has not reached level 5, it will not count toward the invitation quota.
    ○ Each invited Keeper can receive 20/20/20/40 "Silver Key Glimmer" upon reaching levels 5/10/15/20.
    ○ After reaching 400 Keyflare Glimmer, you can claim the Phantom Garment "Doll - Gnostic Reshape".
● For Keepers who have completed the prologue before the update, they can enter another Keeper's invitation code within 7 days after their first login following the update.
 
2.System
[Curriculum]
● The "Curriculum Honor" has added a new option: "Luminous Core" *5. Keepers now have more choices.
 
[Traphase]
● Optimized the matching and score earning experience when the season points are below 1500.
    ○ When the Keeper first experiences "Traphase", the number of matches against system preset rivals increases.
    ○ The score of New Player Protection is increased from 1000 to 1500.
    ○ Keepers with less than 1500 points will be more likely to match against system-preset opponents in their next battle after a defeat.
    ○ Keepers with less than 1500 points will be matched against a system preset rival in their first daily battle.

[Interlude]
● The maximum Menophin that can be consumed for a single Reenact has been increased from 300 to 1000.
 
[Journey]
● When there are claimable rewards, opening the corresponding Journey will automatically navigate to the location of the claimable rewards.
 
[Community]
● Added a "reddit" Link, receive 100 Silvers upon first visit.
● Added "X" Link, receive 100 Silvers upon first access.
 
[Inventory]
● For items such as "Protoparadise" and "Book of Rotation", you can now view a detail preview of the possible items you may obtain in the item information.

3.Battle
[Awakener]
● Pandia
    ○ New Talent - "Punishment Time": For every 1% critical rate from Pandia's own equipment, Wheel of Destiny, and Covenant, the permanent Counter dealt is increased by 0.2%.
    ○ Soulforge Aptitude: "Whip of Madness" gains Retain and Prepare. Final DMG dealt by Pandia to the target with the intent to deal damage is increased by 5~15%. For each additional attack the target performs, the increase is boosted by 5%, up to a maximum additional increase of 20%.
    ○ "Exalt - Honey-Colored Tragedy": Now, when fighting any number of enemies, it will deal damage 2 times.
    ○ "Over-Exaltation=Sweet Surrender" New Effect: Apply 1 stack of "Vulnerable" to all enemies before dealing damage.
    ○ "Wax Hot Desire": The effect of stealing strength is increased from 8% ATK to 16%, and no additional strength is stolen when fighting a single enemy.
● Nymphaea
    ○ Passage of the Ego: The trigger Poison increases from 100% to 120%. The Strength gained increases by 50%.
    ○ Rouse - Drowning in Sorrow: At the end of the turn, increases the Poison inflicted by Nymphaea by 5~10%.
    ○ Enlighten 1 - Ocean's Vessel: The Poison you deal is increased from 50% to 100%. Gained Shield is increased by 50%.
    ○ Enlighten 3 - Frostbloom Tide: The Poison inflicted by subsequent "Passage of the Ego" increases from 72 to 108 points.
    ○ Soulforge Aptitude: Increases the triggered Poison effect of Nymphaea by 15%~35%, and increases the Poison caused by all Awakeners by 10%.
● Hameln
    ○ Enlighten 3 - Moonlit Rhapsody: Maximum increase count is increased from 2 to 3.
    ○ Soulforge Aptitude: After playing an "Insight" card, gain Temporary STR equal to 5%~10% of ATK and trigger 1 "Crescendo". This effect can trigger up to 5 times per round.

● Horla
    ○ Soulforge Aptitude: At the start of the boss battle, gain Death Resistance equal to 5%~15% of Horla's Death Resistance attribute. Each time Death Resistance is triggered, the corresponding effect of "Resplendent Chapters" increases by 50~150% until the end of the turn.

[Enemy]
● Fixed the issue where the maximum HP did not increase after "Maiden of the Gibbous Moon" and "Blade of Utopia" awakened.
● Reduced the max HP of "Palace Housekeeper" Fran.
● Reduced the number of Fortress stacks gained per turn by "Lampshade" Aisha, from 10 to 5.
● Reduced the Max HP and Fortress stacks granted by "Snow Offering" and "Snow Mountain's Cocoon" Skill "Cryo Revival", from 25% and 15 to 15% and 10.
● Slightly increased "Sage"'s Max HP.
 
[D-Effect Zone]
● Slightly reduced enemy HP and DMG during Regional D-Effect Zone II, III, and IV alerts.

4.Traphase
[New Content]
● Mechanism
    ○ Arithmetica Overload: After playing, if the remaining Arithmetica exceeds the required amount for Arithmetica Overload, additionally consume Arithmetica to trigger subsequent effects.
    ○ Falter: Active DMG taken increased by 25%. Removed when taking damage or at the start of the turn.
● Awakener
    ○ Kathigu-Ra
        ■ World-Ending Inferno (Exalt): Deal 12 DMG to all enemies and inflict Falter.
        ■ Apocalypse (Arithmetica Cost 3): Deal 8 damage to all enemies, and for enemies with Falter, change to deal 12 damage, Prepare. Arithmetica Overload 3: Deal double damage.
        ■ Reaper's Bullet (Arithmetica Cost 1): Deal 6 DMG to backline enemies and apply Falter, Prepare. For each of your "Skill" cards played this turn, increase the damage by 2. Arithmetica Overload 1: Return to your hand after playing.
        ■ Combustion (Arithmetica Cost 2): Gain 20 Aliemus, Temporary Amplification +1.
● Wheel of Destiny
    ○ Amber-Tinted Death (Arithmetica Cost 2): After "Exalt", deals 8 damage to the front-row and back-row enemies and applies "Falter".
    ○ Impending Sun (Arithmetica Cost 3): "Strike" DMG increased by 50%, prioritizes attacking back row enemies.
● Posse
    ○ Undying Sun: Arithmetica from this turn can be retained to the next turn, Delay: Gain 2 points of Arithmetica without limit.

[Adjust Content]
● Mechanic-Entwined: The maximum stacks increase from 3 to 5. Take 5 damage and remove 1 stack after playing a card, and remove 1 stack at the end of the turn.
● Awakener:
    ○ Ogier
        ■ "Battle Insight": Arithmetica Cost increases from 3 to 4.
    ○ Wanda
        ■ "Lost Dream's Guide": Initial temporary counter reduced from 8 to 7.
    ○ Agrippa
        ■ "Entwined Silk": Entwined stacks increased from 1 to 2, DMG increased from 7 to 8.
        ■ "Pale Blessing": Increases Entwined from 1 to 2.
    ○ Ryker
        ■ "Ten Rings, Play!": Damage is reduced from 5 to 4.
    ○ Nautila
        ■ "Artisan of Fate": Arithmetica cost increases from 1 to 2.
        ■ "Rusty Wrench": DMG reduced from 8 to 7.
    ○ Miryam
        ■ "Prophecy of Oblivion": DMG reduced from 15 to 13.
    ○ Tulu
        ■ "Monarch's Authority": DMG is reduced from 8 to 7.
        ■ "Eternal Reverberation": DMG reduced from 20 to 18.
    ○ Doll: Inferno
        ■ "Genius' Foresight": After playing, reduce Arithmetica Limit by 1 point. Choose to gain 3 Arithmetica or draw 2 cards.

● Wheel of Destiny:
    ○ Vitality: Arithmetica cost reduced from 4 to 3.
    ○ Punishment: Arithmetica cost increases from 3 to 4, Paralysis duration increases from 3 to 5.
    ○ Million Loving Gaze: Arithmetica cost is reduced from 3 to 2, and the acquired "Skill" no longer has Arithmetica consumption -1.
    ○ Witch's Wide-brimmed Hat: The trigger timing is changed from the end of the turn to the start of the turn, and the Action Lock stacks are increased from 5 to 7.
    ○ Navigator at Sea: HP Recovery reduced from 9 to 8.
    ○ Hour of Fortune:
        ■ Old: "Exalt" Draw 1 card, put 2 copies of it into your hand.
        ■ New: "Exalt" draws 1 "Skill" card, and places 2 copies of it into your hand. Arithmetica cost reduced from 3 to 2.
    ○ Eternal Requiem: The Bleed damage dealt is reduced from 5 to 3.
    ○ Shrouded Birth:
        ■ Old: At the end of the turn, gain 10 Aliemus, and gain an additional 10 Aliemus for each remaining Arithmetica.
        ■ New: At the end of the turn, gain 10 Aliemus and consume all remaining Arithmetica. For each Arithmetica consumed, increase it by 10.
    ○ Heart of Silver: Arithmetica cost is reduced from 2 to 1, and the "Skill" no longer increases DMG, Heal, or Shield.
● Posse:
    ○ Lakeside Glimpse: No longer deals damage, increases Entwined from 1 to 2.
    ○ Festival of Tides: The target's lost Aliemus increases from 15 to 25.

5.Problem Fix and Optimization
● Fixed the issue where the Vulnerableapplied by Awakener Monster "Mareel Glow" when using Lightning Retribution would immediately lose 1 layer.
● Fixed the issue with the functionality description of the Wheel of Destiny "Fin of Sorrow".
● Fixed an issue where the critical rate and critical damage bonus effects provided by the Wheel of Destiny "Sunfall" were incorrectly included in the Awakener's initial attributes by some talents.
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener would incorrectly light up and remain selectable in the Traphase collection after "Black Pool Return".
● Fixed the issue where automatic decomposition of Wheels of Destiny did not increase achievement progress.
● Fixed the issue where clicking on text descriptions of certain Relics did not respond.
● Fixed an issue where "Moonphase Vigil" occasionally failed to pop up when crossing days.
● Fixed an issue where some languages might not fully display the last line of text when playing Awakener dialogue in the "Dormitory".

● Fixed the issue where the Awakener still displayed upgrade effects after "Black Pool Backtracking".
● Fixed an issue where certain map events in "Faded Legacy" incorrectly deducted Aliemus points.
● Fixed an issue where the auto-decompose feature was not triggered when obtaining duplicates of "In the Name of the Silver Key: Keeper".
● Optimized the description of the "Beginner's Special Offer" gift pack, as well as descriptions for special items such as "Protoparadise" and "Book of Rotation." Changed "Choose Any" to "Select" to avoid misunderstandings.
● Optimized the playback effect of storyline text. When a line of storyline text exceeds two lines, it will no longer be displayed across pages, but will continue playing on the same page.
